## Checklist
- [ ] TypeScript compiles with zero errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] ESLint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No new unused imports added
- [ ] If touching migrations: new file is sequential (e.g. `013_...`)
- [ ] If touching Edge Functions: tested locally with Supabase CLI
